query: Where do i go for breakfast on a shopping day?

selected_nodes.xml:
<Restaurant>
  <name>Hotel Continental Breakfast</name>
  <time_block>7:30 AM - 8:30 AM</time_block>
  <description>Quick breakfast at the hotel restaurant. Simple continental options, nothing special but convenient.</description>
  <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
  <expected_cost>CAD 25</expected_cost>
  <highlights>
    <highlight>Quick and convenient</highlight>
    <highlight>Basic options</highlight>
  </highlights>
</Restaurant>
<Restaurant>
  <name>Quick Grab Coffee</name>
  <time_block>7:00 AM - 7:30 AM</time_block>
  <description>Fast coffee and pastry from Tim Hortons. Rushed morning before intense work day.</description>
  <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
  <expected_cost>CAD 8</expected_cost>
  <highlights>
    <highlight>Quick breakfast</highlight>
    <highlight>Grab and go</highlight>
  </highlights>
</Restaurant>
<Restaurant>
  <name>Lady Marmalade</name>
  <time_block>9:00 AM - 10:30 AM</time_block>
  <description>Popular brunch spot in Leslieville known for creative breakfast dishes and great coffee. Trendy neighborhood vibe.</description>
  <travel_method>Taxi</travel_method>
  <expected_cost>CAD 25-35</expected_cost>
  <highlights>
    <highlight>Trendy brunch</highlight>
    <highlight>Creative dishes</highlight>
  </highlights>
</Restaurant>
